title: mentha × hybrida
intro: Mentha × hybrida, also known as peppermint, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it a popular remedy for digestive issues and headaches. The health benefits of peppermint include relief from nausea, improved digestion, and reduced stress levels. Peppermint can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and essential oils, allowing individuals to incorporate its benefits into their daily lives.
